provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Small Business Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation
Establishment of Local Enterprise Authority
provisions.content:
3. Establishment of Local Enterprise Authority
There is hereby established an authority to be known as the Local Enterprise Authority (hereinafter referred to as "the Authority"), which shall be a body corporate with a common seal, capable of suing and being sued and, subject to the provisions of this Act, of performing such acts as bodies corporate may, by law, perform.

provisions.title: Functions of Authority

definitions.definition: the Local Enterprise Authority established under section 3
the Board of the Local Enterprise Authority established under section 6
the chairperson of the Board appointed under section 8(3)
a business entity with such annual turnover and staff complement as the Minister may, by Order published in the Gazette , prescribe
a business entity with such annual turnover and staff complement as the Minister may, by Order published in the Gazette , prescribe
